title: Blood Urea Nitrogen Analysis Protocol
author: John Stack
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y3qfymw

steps.title: Calibrate Cobas for BUN analysis by...
steps.instruction: Calibrate Cobas for BUN analysis by running a multi analyte standard and two assayed control serums.

steps.title: Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus
steps.instruction: Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus. a) Cobas pipettes 2 µL of sample into a cuvette slot. b) Absorbance is measured at 340 nm. c) Add 200 µL of BUN liquid reagent. d) Mixture is incubated at 37ºC for 10 minutes. e) Absorbance is measured at 340 nm. Change in absorbance is calculated.
